creator: alisonatwork@gmail.com
text:
There are several out-of-date parts of the website, but perhaps the worst is the link to DaemonNews, which now appears to be some kind of spam website.

Page:
http://www.freebsd.org/advocacy/myths.html

Paragraph starting:
"The *BSD projects cooperate in other areas as well."

I would suggest the whole paragraph could be removed. The whole section could use an update, too, since FreeBSD/NetBSD/OpenBSD have been split for over 20 years now. Aside from Dragonfly and perhaps PC-BSD i don't really think anything else has a lot of mindshare today.
